reviews.review_title: What happened to the seated mode
reviews.review_description: What happened to seated mode, you can advertise and sell a game as seated mode and then take seated mode away that's like buying a car and then the dealership take the steering wheel out a lot of people bought the game because of seated mode what were you thinking were you even thinking about your customers meta should make you refund every customer that bought it for seated mode or at least change it back so it's optional I was just starting to enjoy the game again taking those big ridiculous panels off of the Fighter's heads and off the wall that was a great move but now you're using room scale when you sold the game as seated

developer_response.body: Hello, I'm happy to hear that you like the seated version, I had to temoprartily remove it because it crashed the game. I will put it back ASAP. Please have patience a couple of days, and it will be introduced again. Please contracy me directly on peter.karrlander@mac.com and I keep you posted directly. In the mean time you can install the previous version. It is available in the release channel: InternatTest2

reviews.review_description: I wasn't able to play the game at first. There was just a black screen. However, Peter got in touch quickly and fixed the problem. Now I'm enjoying the game. It's a fun game, very happy I can now play it. Thank you!

developer_response.body: I'm really happy that I could find the bug and fix it. Thanks for being patient waiting for the upgrade!

reviews.review_description:
There a bunch of glitches 
 In training. The boxer stands to the left of you. There’s no way to move him over 
When your doing pad work and hit the spots sometimes it doesn’t register. Can be a bit annoying.  Overall. I’m enjoying the game - workouts.    3 stars for now.  Hopefully it only gets better

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. I'm looking over some of the bugs in the training session, and these will be fixed in the next update that is coming soon. You can always contact me directly on peter.karrlandermac.com for direct support

reviews.review_description: Thank you game creator for your hard work! Game is working now and one of my favorite boxing games on the quest! Great training and great gameplay. I like that you can take on matches in career mode, and you can also train improve your real life boxing skills in gym mode. There are training options from sparring drills, mitt work, a fun punch canon game, etc. and also training that caters to specific punches you want to work on. The owner is also very committed to the game! He’s very supportive if any issues come up and easy person to talk to. I look forward to the constant development of true boxing Vr and think this can be the best boxing game in VR!

I'm on quest 3s 128gb, cant see controllers, loads game to screen with stars going past with game logo then visuals stop, can still hear sound asking to pick how I wish to play standing or seated, not running anything else. GL

Update:  still no difference same as before

reviews.review_title: Great boxing experience / training in VR
reviews.review_description:
The installation went completely smoothly – quick, easy, and without any issues. Even the first launch left a very positive impression.

The game itself is excellently designed and offers two main experiences: on the one hand, you can really learn something about boxing – terminology, technique, stance, movements – everything is presented in a very clear and practical way. On the other hand, you can of course step into the ring and fight real matches. The developers clearly know a lot about boxing.

The graphical quality is impressive: the characters are detailed, the textures and materials look realistic, and the overall atmosphere is fantastic. The animations are particularly noteworthy – they’re smooth and natural, making you truly feel the dynamics of a real fight.
The feedback system is also brilliantly executed. Hits, movements, and reactions feel authentic, immersing you completely in the experience. It’s clear that the developers have put great emphasis on performance, immersion, and technical quality.

Of course, like many games, there’s still room for refinement. But considering the price of just 10 euros, you’re getting an exceptionally high-quality and thoroughly enjoyable VR experience.
My conclusion: a great boxing game full of attention to detail, technically outstanding, and a real highlight for all VR fans.

 From me, it’s a clear 5 stars!

First game ive ever played to crash my system. Good idea, horrible developers. Game is broken beyond belief. Started on the home page, looked up and the game crashed and i had to reset my system. Doesnt even deserve a star tbh.

developer_response.body: Hello, Sorry to hear that tyou had problems. I have uploaded a new version (85), that should hopefully take care of your problem. Update your app and make sure it says version 85. Contact me at peter.karrlander@mac.com for direct support.

reviews.review_description: This is a very realistic and fun boxing vr experience. I like that there are both training opportunities as well as fight option. Highly recommended.
Update: Issue has been fixed. Appreciate Devs’ responsiveness!
Start the game black screen can only see gloves

developer_response.body:
Hello, It has happened two times, I need to find out what is happening. Please go to the discord so I can get all information and find what is wrong. https://discord.gg/EZ36mzCuNZ

Also try to update the headset to the latest software version. I had this happen in a Quest Pro, and after updating it, the app worked

reviews.review_description:
Waaaay to many bugs still. The punches are not accurate, it doest let me block its like the opponent throws a punch and goes through my arms, I can't change my name so im stuck with player 1, its only stick movement which I cannot stand and there's no mix reality. But other then that it looks good lol. It needs alot of work but im not giving up on the devs yet! 😉




UPDATE: I learned how to block..  hands up and the trigger buttons.

I feel like it’s not ready yet. The training sessions glitches and skips steps. I have an empty bedroom and my boundary fills up the entire room, yet when I’m fighting it still finds a away to escape my boundary. I have to focus more on getting the fighters back inside my boundary (an entire empty bedroom🙄) then actually fighting them. This is supposed to be the go to game for training and it cost $10.99 I just don’t want to punch through drywall. The ring needs to be more controlled and like Thrill of the Fight. I like that the fighters move around more than thrill of the fight, for footwork purposes, but it’s too jumpy. My rating is temporary pending new updates.

developer_response.body: Hello, The safe boundary is now fixed in the latest update. Also the workout session has been updated and fixed. Please check it out!

reviews.review_description: This game lokwy fun, good fighting and has huge potential
